name: UpgradePackage
description: Existing customer wants to upgrade, enhance, or expand their current Virgin Media package — including faster speeds, additional products, newer equipment, or higher-tier plans. The customer already has services and wants to improve what they have.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I want to upgrade my {productTypeUpgrade}
